item.title: First reading, referred to Early Learning & K-12 Education.
item.description: First reading, referred to Early Learning & K-12 Education.
item.guid: 2026-01-21/First reading, referred to Early Learning & K-12 Education.

item.title: 👍💵Arzu Forough - Washington Autism Alliance
item.description: Arzu Forough signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Autism Alliance. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Julie Gunter - Washington Autism Alliance
item.description: Julie Gunter signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Cathy Murahashi - The Arc of Washington
item.description: Cathy Murahashi signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent The Arc of Washington.

item.title: 👍Jessica Walsh - The Arc of Washington
item.description: Jessica Walsh signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Tyler Muench - Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction
item.description: Tyler Muench signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction.

item.title: EDU - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.description: EDU - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.guid: 2026-02-04/EDU - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading consent calendar.
item.description: Placed on second reading consent calendar.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 49; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 0.
